buses.note: Bus routes serve Bowen Hills via Brunswick Street and Abbotsford Road.

driving.motorway_access: Inner City Bypass and Story Bridge access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 3 to 6 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to Fortitude Valley and the CBD

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Bowen Hills sits adjacent to Fortitude Valley and the James Street precinct, both within walking distance for dining and retail. The Newstead Gasworks is a short walk for additional dining.

pockets.name: Apartment market
pockets.character: Apartment-heavy stock close to the train station.

pockets.name: RNA precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the showgrounds redevelopment area.

buyer_profile.note: Train station and CBD proximity supports rental demand.
Apartment market offers accessible entry into inner Brisbane.
